description: Style Noteganuchi comes up with a new design update for the mid-top chukka boot - a foldover fabric layer! Roll up your denims to show this stylish piece of work. For a dressy look style this with tonal chinos, a linen shirt and a casual blazer.Product Details Round toed, brown mid-top chukka boots with a fold-over fabric layer with printed branding (at the mouth)Lace-up styling with the lacing running through the fabric foldUpper adhered to the TPU outsoleOutsole has a stacked heel with aggressive lugs all overMaterial and CareLeatherUse a leather conditioner to clean productDo not store in direct sunlight
